message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml

database "tuple" as tuple
actor "Upper\nlayer" as upper

box "IP Layer" #LightGray
participant "IPv4\nlayer" as ipv4layer
database "Routing\ntable" as routing
end box

box "IPv4 Ineterface" #LightGray
participant "IPv4\ninterface" as ipv4if
participant "ARP" as arp
end box

actor "Lower\nlayer" as lower

note left of upper #LightYellow
IPv4.dst=192.0.2.1
IPv4.src=198.51.100.2
end note

upper -> ipv4layer : IPdata

note over ipv4layer #LightYellow
Allocate
IPv4
header
end note

ipv4layer -> routing : dst=192.0.2.1
routing ..> ipv4layer

ipv4layer ..> tuple

note left of ipv4layer #LightYellow
IPv4.oif=ifp1
IPv4.gw=198.51.100.1
end note

ipv4layer -> ipv4if

ipv4if -> arp : gw=198.51.100.1

note right of arp #LightYellow
enqueue
packet
end note

arp <.. lower : ARP request
arp -> lower : ARP request

lower -> arp : ARP response
arp <- lower : ARP response

arp ..> ipv4if : resolved\npackets

ipv4if -> ipv4if : send as\nsend\nthread

ipv4if <- lower
ipv4if -> lower

@enduml
```
